description: Follow-up email adds agenda details to existing meeting

actual.title: Board Meeting
actual.description:
Quarterly board meeting
Agenda: 1) Financial review 2) Product roadmap 3) Hiring plans 4) Q2 goals. Breakfast provided.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Board Meeting
- Start: 2026-05-05T09:00:00
- End: 2026-05-05T12:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Executive Boardroom
- Description: Quarterly board meeting
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: update):**
- Title: Board Meeting
- Start: 2026-05-05T09:00:00
- End: 2026-05-05T12:00:00
- All Day: False
- Location: Executive Boardroom
- Description: Agenda: 1) Financial review 2) Product roadmap 3) Hiring plans 4) Q2 goals. Breakfast provided.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}

Breakfast provided.", "importance": "action_required"}
